title: Implement Settings Page & Profile Management
history: Added robust unit tests in SettingsPage.test.tsx

title: Implement Client & Property Registry (Shadow System)
history: Added country column to properties table
Refactored Client and Property Repositories to use this.client

title: Client Detail View + Lightweight CRM
history: Added ClientSummary type and jobRepository.listByClient, invoiceRepository.listByClient
Enhanced ClientList with search, job count, last job, email, table on desktop, FAB and empty-state CTA
Rewrote ClientDetailPage with useClientDetail, breadcrumb, properties/jobs/invoice sections, last serviced, edit and soft delete with confirmation
Added ClientEditPage with usePersistentForm and SyncBadge

title: SaaS Subscription Gate
history: Extended Stripe webhook for subscription lifecycle events
Added SaaS checkout and billing portal edge functions with validateReturnUrl
Exposed subscription state in AuthContext and gated ProtectedRoute
Implemented /subscribe page, billing settings, dashboard trial UI, and i18n
Added tests for subscription helpers, hook, and webhook handler

title: Invoicing & Payments (Stripe Direct Charge)
history: DB migration: invoices, invoice_items, invoice_tokens tables, invoice_status enum, get_invoice_by_token RPC, profiles tax rate and Stripe Connect columns
Edge functions: generate-invoice-pdf, finalize-and-send-invoice, create-payment-intent, stripe-webhook-handler, void-invoice, create-connect-onboarding
Frontend: PublicInvoicePage with Stripe Payment Element, StripeConnectPage, InvoiceDetailPage updates
Hooks: useInvoices, useInvoiceByToken, useFinalizeInvoice, useVoidInvoice, invoiceRepository updated
i18n: settings.stripe.* and invoices.public.* keys EN/FR
Security: open redirect fix, XSS fix, overcharge bugfix

title: Launch — Deploy, Smoke Test & Ship
history: Fixed .env.example: removed duplicate VITE_SUPABASE_URL, corrected malformed placeholder
Updated supabase/config.toml: added all edge function entries with correct verify_jwt settings
Deleted stripe-webhook stub, retained stripe-webhook-handler as sole webhook endpoint

title: Admin Portal
history: Added /admin route and conditionally rendered Sidebar link
